ingredients.note: OCR shows ditto mark for kg; translation lists as g, likely same unit as sugar (kg)
Quantity likely in kg, consistent with other solids

steps_en: Combine sugar, tartaric acid, currant preserve, red wine, and raspberry vinegar in a boiling pan.
Add starch syrup either together with the other liquids and sugar before heating, or after the sugar has finished cooking, or ideally just before filtration.
Heat the mixture for the shortest possible duration to preserve quality.
notes_en: The use of starch syrup (glucose) must be declared per public health regulations. This recipe demonstrates a mixed sugar/glucose syrup formulation as referenced in the general text on glucosated syrups.
